articles.author: Aisha Malik
articles.title: Google Translate’s real-time headphone translations feature expands to iOS and more countries - TechCrunch
articles.description: The real-time headphone translations experience keeps each speaker’s tone, emphasis, and cadence intact, so it’s easier to follow the conversation and tell who’s saying what.
articles.content:
Google announced on Thursday that “Live Translate,” its AI-powered Google Translate feature that lets you hear real-time translations in your headphones, is expanding to iOS and to more countries.
